title: fraxinus velutina var. papillosa
intro: Fraxinus velutina var. papillosa, also known as the velvet ash, is a variety of ash tree that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus velutina var. papillosa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
